source: Transcribed from spec-generator-service-catalogue.md, spec-generator-catalogue-audit.md, and spec-generator-prescription-dial.md. This file is DATA: improving an archetype requires editing this file and re-running `npm run seed:catalogue` — no application code change (NFR-C4).

brings_fr.text: Registration, login, and logout are supported.
Password reset and account recovery are supported.
Session lifecycle (issue, refresh, expiry) is defined.
Email verification is required before privileged actions.

watch_for.text: Token expiry/refresh and account lockout handled.
Permission checks on every endpoint, not just the UI.
Deletion vs deactivation distinguished.

archetypes.name: Authorisation & access control
user_says: control what each user can do

brings_fr.text: A permission model (RBAC/ABAC) governs access to resources.
Access is denied by default and granted explicitly.
Per-resource permission checks are enforced server-side.

watch_for.text: Authorisation enforced server-side on every endpoint, not just hidden in UI.
Permission changes take effect on live sessions.
Role explosion is avoided.

prescription_overrides.item: permission change applies to live sessions

archetypes.name: Tenancy & org model
user_says: separate companies/teams keep their data apart

brings_fr.text: Org/workspace creation and member invitation are supported.
A data-isolation boundary separates tenants.

watch_for.text: Cross-tenant data leakage is prevented (the #1 platform security bug).
Isolation strategy (row/schema/DB) is chosen.
A user may belong to many orgs.

brings_fr.text: Entity contracts and schema are defined.
A migration strategy (expand/contract) is defined.

watch_for.text: Referential integrity is maintained.
Migration rollback is possible.
Soft vs hard delete and PII retention are decided.

brings_fr.text: OLTP and OLAP workloads are separated.
A caching strategy with invalidation is defined.

watch_for.text: Analytics does not run on the transactional database.
No PII enters the analytics store without a basis.

prescription_overrides.item: no PII in the analytics store without basis

archetypes.name: API / contract layer
user_says: all the devices talk to one backend

brings_fr.text: Endpoint contracts and request/response shapes are defined.
A versioning policy is stated.

watch_for.text: One contract serves all clients (web + mobile).
Error shape is consistent across endpoints.

brings_fr.text: API keys/OAuth clients authenticate external callers.
Rate limiting and quotas are applied per client.

watch_for.text: Versioning precedes breaking changes; deprecation is communicated.
Key rotation is supported.

archetypes.name: Sync & offline
user_says: works on my phone with no signal, then catches up

brings_fr.text: A local cache and change queue support offline use.
A conflict-resolution policy is chosen and stated.

watch_for.text: Conflict resolution (last-write-wins/merge/prompt) is decided to avoid silent data loss.
Offline UX states are designed.

prescription_overrides.item: a conflict-resolution policy is chosen and stated

brings_fr.text: An async job queue and scheduled tasks are supported.
Failed jobs are routed to dead-letter handling.

watch_for.text: Consumers are idempotent (at-least-once delivery).
Poison messages and ordering guarantees are handled.

brings_fr.text: Push, email, and in-app delivery channels are supported.
Users can set notification preferences and opt out.

watch_for.text: Consent and a working unsubscribe are provided (legal).
Channels are deduped; quiet hours respected.

brings_fr.text: Users can upload files with access control on retrieval.
Thumbnails/transforms and CDN delivery are supported.

watch_for.text: File-type validation is enforced.
Signed URLs and orphaned-file cleanup are handled.

brings_fr.text: Indexed query with filters and facets is supported.
Results are permission-aware.

watch_for.text: Search respects permissions (never returns what the user can't see).
Index freshness is managed.

archetypes.name: Audit & logging
user_says: we can see who did what

brings_fr.text: An immutable event log records actor, action, and timestamp.
Audit records are queryable and exportable.

watch_for.text: No PII is written to logs; the audit trail is tamper-evident.
Retention is defined.

brings_fr.text: Health and readiness checks are exposed.
Metrics, traces, and structured logs are emitted.

watch_for.text: Observability is seeded by default (the most-skipped foundation).

brings_fr.text: A flag store enables/disables features without redeploying.
Plans, payment-provider integration, and invoicing are supported.
Entitlements are enforced server-side.

watch_for.text: Tax/GST correctness is ensured.
Failed-payment recovery and proration are handled.

brings_fr.text: Account creation with guided setup and progress indication.
Empty first-run state is seeded.

watch_for.text: Abandonment/resume and skip-and-return are handled.

archetypes.name: Dashboard / analytics view
user_says: see key numbers at a glance

brings_fr.text: Metric tiles and charts with a date-range filter and drill-down.

watch_for.text: Empty/loading/error/stale states exist for every widget.
Query-performance budget and aggregate timezone are defined.

brings_fr.text: Create/read/update/delete/list per entity with validation.
Permissions are enforced per operation.

watch_for.text: Per-operation permissions, not just per-screen.
Optimistic-concurrency conflicts and cascade-delete behaviour handled.

archetypes.name: List + detail (master–detail)
user_says: browse a list, click into one

brings_fr.text: Paginated list with sort/filter and a deep-linkable detail view.

watch_for.text: Pagination/filter state in URL; empty and deleted-item states.

brings_fr.text: A state model with transitions, guards, and status history.
Notifications fire on transitions.

watch_for.text: State-machine completeness: every transition incl. error, timeout, reversal.
Transition authorisation (who may move what) is enforced.

brings_fr.text: Field validation with conditional fields and review-before-submit.
Multi-step forms support save-draft and resume.

watch_for.text: Accessible error messaging (labels, errors, focus order).
Inline vs submit validation and autosave loss handled.

brings_fr.text: A preference store with per-user/per-org scope and reset.

watch_for.text: Which settings are per-device vs synced is decided.

brings_fr.text: View/edit profile, change password, and manage connected devices.
Account deletion and personal-data export are supported.

watch_for.text: Account deletion meets data-retention obligations.

brings_fr.text: A chronological/ranked feed with read state and refresh.

watch_for.text: Pagination stability, real-time updates, and empty state.

brings_fr.text: Threaded send/receive with read receipts and attachments.

watch_for.text: Blocking/abuse handling is provided (trust & safety).
Delivery guarantees and ordering are defined.

brings_fr.text: Availability with slot booking and conflict detection.
Reminders and timezone handling are supported.

watch_for.text: No double-booking (concurrency) and correct timezone/DST handling.

brings_fr.text: Map rendering with markers, geosearch, and clustering.

watch_for.text: Location-permission consent is captured.

archetypes.name: Marketplace / two-sided listings
user_says: let providers list services and buyers enquire

brings_fr.text: Listing CRUD with discovery, detail, and enquiry/booking.
Two distinct role journeys are specified.

watch_for.text: Both role journeys specified; payment handled on platform.
Review moderation is provided.

brings_fr.text: Authoring with draft/publish workflow and versioning.

watch_for.text: Preview, rollback, and SEO metadata are handled.

brings_fr.text: Report templates with CSV/PDF/XLSX export.

watch_for.text: No PII in exports without a basis.
Large-export timeouts and format correctness handled.

prescription_overrides.item: no PII in exports without basis

archetypes.name: Notification centre / inbox
user_says: a place to see all alerts

brings_fr.text: An inbox with read/unread, mark-all, and deep-link to source.
Hero, sections, and a signup CTA with responsive layout.

watch_for.text: Mostly low-checkability (taste) — spend detail on examples, not rules.

brings_fr.text: Query input with facet filters, sort, and a no-result state.

watch_for.text: Results are permission-aware (inherits Search).

archetypes.name: Data migration
user_says: move the data to the new system

brings_fr.text: An idempotent runner with dry-run mode and batching.
Row-count and checksum reconciliation with rollback.

watch_for.text: No data loss; source and target reconcile.
Idempotency (re-run safely) and partial-failure resume.

archetypes.name: Refactoring
user_says: clean it up without changing what it does

brings_fr.text: A constraint set plus a strong regression-test gate.

watch_for.text: Observable behaviour and the public contract are unchanged.
A regression suite must exist (precondition/gate).

brings_fr.text: Auth to the external service with data mapping and webhook receipt.
Retry/backoff and a degraded mode on outage.

watch_for.text: Webhook handling is idempotent.
External outages and credential rotation are handled.

brings_fr.text: File parse with a validation report and partial-accept.
Dedupe and dry-run preview are supported.

watch_for.text: Validation before commit (no partial corruption).

brings_fr.text: Baseline measurement, a target, and a regression guard.

watch_for.text: Behaviour unchanged; the meter is defined before optimising.

brings_fr.text: Usage check, migration path, comms, phased disable, and removal.

watch_for.text: Dependency/usage check before removal.

brings_fr.text: Contrast, keyboard nav, focus order, and labels meet WCAG 2.2 AA.

watch_for.text: Mechanisable checks (contrast, touch-target, keyboard, focus) gate the build.

prescription_overrides.item: mechanisable checks (contrast, touch-target, keyboard nav, focus order)

brings_fr.text: String externalisation, locale formats, RTL, and timezone handling.

watch_for.text: Where a locale is legally mandated it becomes a constraint.

brings_fr.text: Input validation, secrets management, and dependency scanning.
Encryption in transit and at rest is applied.

watch_for.text: Authz, input validation, encryption, secrets, supply-chain scanning enforced.
Threat-model process and pen-test cadence considered.

prescription_overrides.item: authz, input validation, encryption in transit + at rest, secrets management, dependency/supply-chain scanning

brings_fr.text: Consent capture, data export, deletion/erasure, and retention schedule.

watch_for.text: Consent, export, deletion, and a retention schedule exist.
Consent-UX wording is reviewed.

archetypes.name: Resilience / degraded-mode (SRE)
user_says: it keeps working when something fails

brings_fr.text: Timeouts, retries, circuit breakers, and graceful degradation.
Backups are restore-tested with stated RPO/RTO.

watch_for.text: What the platform does when a dependency is down is defined.

brings_fr.text: Audit-trail completeness with evidence retention and role segregation.

watch_for.text: Audit completeness and a waiver log with reason are maintained.

prescription_overrides.item: audit completeness; waiver log with reason

brings_fr.text: A test pyramid (unit→integration→contract→e2e) with test-data management.

watch_for.text: Coverage target per feature is stated.

brings_fr.text: An event taxonomy with funnels and consent-aware tracking.

watch_for.text: Tracking is consent-aware only.

archetypes.name: Documentation & decision records
user_says: decisions and docs are written down

brings_fr.text: ADRs, API docs, runbooks, and onboarding docs are maintained.

archetypes.name: Cost / FinOps awareness
user_says: keep an eye on running costs

brings_fr.text: Resource budgets and cost observability are tracked.
Build, ordered test gates, lint/typecheck gates, and PR checks.

watch_for.text: Gate ordering (fast tests first); deploy-on-green only.

brings_fr.text: Environment definitions with config-per-environment and a promotion path.

watch_for.text: Dev/prod parity; secrets never in code.

archetypes.name: Infrastructure-as-Code
user_says: the servers are defined in code, not clicked

brings_fr.text: Declarative infra with provisioning and drift detection.

watch_for.text: State management and least-privilege deploy credentials.

brings_fr.text: Gradual rollout (blue-green/canary) with instant rollback.

watch_for.text: Backward-compatible migrations during rollout; rollback loses no data.

archetypes.name: Incident response & runbooks
user_says: when it breaks, there's a plan

brings_fr.text: Alert routing, on-call/escalation, runbooks, and post-incident review.

watch_for.text: Undocumented tribal knowledge; undefined severity levels.

archetypes.name: Backup & disaster recovery
user_says: we can recover from a catastrophe

brings_fr.text: A backup schedule with restore tests and stated RPO/RTO.

watch_for.text: Backups are restore-tested; backup encryption applied.

archetypes.name: Responsive web
user_says: works in a web browser on any screen

watch_for.text: Breakpoint behaviour and browser-support matrix defined.
Requires the Sync & offline foundation.

archetypes.name: Native mobile (iOS / Android)
user_says: a phone app from the app store

watch_for.text: App-store review requirements and per-platform permission UX.
Native surface security and auto-update handled.
